title: zeia × pseudorepens
intro: Zeia × pseudorepens, also known as Zea × mays pseudorepens, is a hybrid of corn that has escaped from cultivation and has naturalized in some areas. This plant is often considered a weed, but it has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe skin irritations. The health benefits of Zeia × pseudorepens include its potential to treat wounds, eczema, and other skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Zeia × pseudorepens can be prepared as a salve or infusion to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
